extraction.one_line_summary: MERLIER Tim won a bunch sprint after CAVENDISH Mark's Deceuninck team controlled and delivered their sprinter to the line in pursuit of Merckx's record
tactical_patterns: COLBRELLI Sonny probed CAVENDISH's leadout train mid-stage but MØRKØV Michael immediately shut it down, showing Deceuninck's willingness to defend early
Deceuninck committed full team to pace entire stage for CAVENDISH rather than conserving resources, revealing all-in approach when sprinter opportunities rare

rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: Team rode full gas entire stage despite climbs, showing organizational commitment to sprint opportunities after mountain gauntlet
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: neutral: Tested CAVENDISH's train strength mid-stage but was immediately neutralized by MØRKØV, lacked follow-through in final
rider_signals.VAN DER SANDE Tosh: neutral: First Tour appearance after nine pro years, made breakaway but commentary suggests limited threat level
